title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page and see a blank screen.

title: Payment gateway timeout
description: Checkout process fails due to payment gateway timeout error.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Customer profile updates are not saved after submission.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales numbers displayed on dashboard do not match reports.

title: Email notifications not received
description: Order confirmation emails are not being delivered to customers.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: UI components overlap on smaller mobile screens.

title: Password reset link expired
description: Generated password reset links expire immediately.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Search results take more than 10 seconds to load.

title: File upload fails
description: Uploading attachments larger than 5MB results in an error.

title: Incorrect invoice total
description: Invoice total calculation does not include applied discounts correctly.

title: API response delay
description: Backend API responses are taking longer than expected during peak hours.

title: Broken image links on homepage
description: Several product images are not loading on the homepage.

title: Order history not displaying
description: Customers cannot view their previous orders in the dashboard.

title: Session logout issue
description: Users are automatically logged out after a few minutes of inactivity.

title: Discount code not applying
description: Promo codes are not applying correctly at checkout.
